Interrupts.name: INT_PIN_CFG

fields.name: INT1_ACTL
fields.description: 1 – The logic level for INT1 pin is active low. 0 – The logic level for INT1 pin is active high.

fields.name: INT1_OPEN
fields.description: 1 – INT1 pin is configured as open drain. 0 – INT1 pin is configured as push-pull.

fields.name: INT1_LATCH__EN
fields.description: 1 – INT1 pin level held until interrupt status is cleared. 0 – INT1 pin indicates interrupt pulse is width 50 µs.

fields.name: INT_ANYRD_2CLEAR
fields.description: 1 – Any read operation clears interrupt status.

fields.name: BYPASS_EN
fields.description: Enable bypass mode for I2C Master.

quality_issues: missing_register_page: source pages exist but logical register page is unknown

fields.name: REG_WOF_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable wake on FSYNC interrupt. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: WOM_INT_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable interrupt for wake on motion to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: PLL_RDY_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable PLL RDY interrupt (PLL RDY means PLL is running and in use as the clock source for the system) to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: DMP_INT1_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable DMP interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable I^2 C master interrupt to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

Interrupts.name: INT_ENABLE_1

fields.name: RAW_DATA_0_RDY_EN
fields.description: Enable raw data ready interrupt from any sensor to propagate to interrupt pin 1.

fields.name: FIFO_OVERFLOW_EN
fields.description: 1 - Enable interrupt for FIFO overflow to propagate to interrupt pin 1. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: PLL_RDY_INT
fields.description: 1 - Indicates that the PLL has been enabled and is ready (delay of 4 ms ensures lock).

fields.name: DMP_INT1

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT
fields.description: 1 - Indicates I^2 C master has generated an interrupt.

Gyroscope.name: DELAY_TIMEH
Gyroscope.description: High-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event.

fields.name: DELAY_TIMEH
fields.description: High-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event.

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_YOUT_H
Gyroscope.description: High Byte of Gyroscope Y-axis data

fields.name: GYRO_YOUT_H
fields.description: High Byte of Gyroscope Y-axis data

Gyroscope.name: GYRO_YOUT_L
Gyroscope.description: Low Byte of Gyroscope Y-axis data. To convert the output of the gyroscope to angular rate measurement use the formula below: Y_angular_rate = GYRO_YOUT/Gyro_Sensitivity

fields.name: GYRO_YOUT_L
fields.description: Low Byte of Gyroscope Y-axis data. To convert the output of the gyroscope to angular rate measurement use the formula below: Y_angular_rate = GYRO_YOUT/Gyro_Sensitivity

fields.name: ZA_OFFS
fields.description: Upper bits of the Z accelerometer offset cancellation. +/- 16g Offset cancellation in all Full Scale modes, 15 bit 0.98-mg steps.

Accelerometer.name: ACCEL_XOUT_H
Accelerometer.description: High Byte of Accelerometer X-axis data.

fields.name: ACCEL_XOUT_H[7:0]
fields.description: High Byte of Accelerometer X-axis data.

Accelerometer.name: ACCEL_XOUT_L
Accelerometer.description: Low Byte of Accelerometer X-axis data

fields.name: ACCEL_XOUT_L
fields.description: Low Byte of Accelerometer X-axis data. To convert the output of the accelerometer to acceleration measurement use the formula below: X_acceleration = ACCEL_XOUT/Accel_Sensitivity

Accelerometer.name: ACCEL_YOUT_H
Accelerometer.description: High Byte of Accelerometer Y-axis data

fields.name: ACCEL_YOUT_H[7:0]
fields.description: High Byte of Accelerometer Y-axis data.

Accelerometer.name: ACCEL_YOUT_L
Accelerometer.description: Low Byte of Accelerometer Y-axis data

fields.name: ACCEL_YOUT_L
fields.description: Low Byte of Accelerometer Y-axis data. To convert the output of the accelerometer to acceleration measurement use the formula below: Y_acceleration = ACCEL_YOUT/Accel_Sensitivity

Temperature.name: TEMP_OUT_H
Temperature.description: High Byte of Temp sensor data.

fields.name: TEMP_OUT_H[7:0]
fields.description: High Byte of Temp sensor data.

Temperature.name: TEMP_OUT_L
Temperature.description: Low Byte of Temp sensor data. To convert the output of the temperature sensor to degrees C use the following formula: TEMP_degC = ((TEMP_OUT - RoomTemp_Offset)/Temp_Sensitivity) + 21degC

fields.name: TEMP_OUT_L
fields.description: Low Byte of Temp sensor data. To convert the output of the temperature sensor to degrees C use the following formula: TEMP_degC = ((TEMP_OUT - RoomTemp_Offset)/Temp_Sensitivity) + 21degC

fields.name: TEMP_DLPFCFG
fields.description: Temperature digital low pass filter configuration

fields.name: YA_OFFS
fields.description: Lower bits of the Y accelerometer offset cancellation. +/- 16g Offset cancellation in all Full Scale modes, 15 bit 0.98-mg steps.

FSYNC.name: DELAY_TIMEL
FSYNC.description: Low-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event. Delay time in µs = (DELAY_TIMEH * 256 + DELAY_TIMEL) * 0.9645

fields.name: DELAY_TIMEL[7:0]
fields.description: Low-byte of delay time between FSYNC event and the 1st gyro ODR event (after the FSYNC event). Reading DELAY_TIMEH will lock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL from the next update. Reading DELAY_TIMEL will unlock DELAY_TIMEH and DELAY_TIMEL to take the next update due to an FSYNC event. Delay time in µs = (DELAY_TIMEH * 256 + DELAY_TIMEL) * 0.9645

fields.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_00[7:0]
fields.description: Sensor data read from external I^2 C devices via the I^2 C master interface. The data stored is controlled by the I2C_SLV(0-4)_ADDR, I2C_SLV(0-4)_REG, and I2C_SLV(0- 4)_CTRL registers.

fields.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_04[7:0]
fields.description: Sensor data read from external I^2C devices via the I^2C master interface. The data stored is controlled by the I2C_SLV(0-4)_ADDR, I2C_SLV(0-4)_REG, and I2C_SLV(0-4)_CTRL registers.

External_Sensor_Data.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_12
External_Sensor_Data.description: Sensor data read from external I^2C devices via the I^2C master interface. The data stored is controlled by the I2C_SLV(0-4)_ADDR, I2C_SLV(0-4)_REG, and I2C_SLV(0-4)_CTRL registers.

fields.name: EXT_SLV_SENS_DATA_12[7:0]
fields.description: Sensor data read from external I^2C devices via the I^2C master interface. The data stored is controlled by the I2C_SLV(0-4)_ADDR, I2C_SLV(0-4)_REG, and I2C_SLV(0-4)_CTRL registers.

fields.name: SLV_3_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_3 (as determined by I2C_SLV2_CTRL, I2C_SLV1_CTRL, and I2C_SL20_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_2_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_2 (as determined by I2C_SLV0_CTRL, I2C_SLV1_CTRL, and I2C_SL20_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_1_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_1 (as determined by I2C_SLV0_CTRL and I2C_SLV1_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: SLV_0_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write EXT_SENS_DATA registers associated to SLV_0 (as determined by I2C_SLV0_CTRL) to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: ACCEL_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write ACCEL_XOUT_H, ACCEL_XOUT_L, ACCEL_YOUT_H, ACCEL_YOUT_L, ACCEL_ZOUT_H, and ACCEL_ZOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate; 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_Z_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_ZOUT_H and GYRO_ZOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_Y_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_YOUT_H and GYRO_YOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: GYRO_X_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write GYRO_XOUT_H and GYRO_XOUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: TEMP_FIFO_EN
fields.description: 1 - Write TEMP_OUT_H and TEMP_OUT_L to the FIFO at the sample rate. 0 - Function is disabled.

fields.name: FIFO_CNT
fields.description: High bits of FIFO byte count

FIFO.name: FIFO_COUNTL
FIFO.description: Low bits, count indicates the number of written bytes in the FIFO.

fields.name: FIFO_CNT
fields.description: Low bits, count indicates the number of written bytes in the FIFO.

fields.name: WOF_STATUS
fields.description: Wake on FSYNC interrupt status. Cleared on read.

fields.name: RAW_DATA_RDY
fields.description: Data from sensors is copied to FIFO or SRAM. Set when sequence controller kicks off on a sensor data load. Only bit 0 is relevant in a single FIFO configuration. Cleared on read.

fields.name: ODR_ALIGN_EN
fields.description: 0: Disables ODR start-time alignment. 1: Enables ODR start-time alignment when any of the following registers is written (with the same value or with different values): GYRO_SMPLRT_DIV, ACCEL_SMPLRT_DIV_1, ACCEL_SMPLRT_DIV_2, I2C_MST_ODR_CONFIG.

fields.name: USER_BANK
fields.description: Use the following values in this bit-field to select a USER BANK. 0: Select USER BANK 0. 1: Select USER BANK 1. 2: Select USER BANK 2. 3: Select USER BANK 3.
